messages.content:
I'll start by loading the execution-trace skill as required before doing anything else.

Now loading the report-analyzer skill.





Now I'll analyze the document from the provided URL. Based on the document name `2 TD chartnote_Redacted.pdf`, this is a clinical chart note / lab report. I will now apply the report-analyzer skill and BloomCell framework to generate the 8 structured analysis objects.

Based on the PDF content from the chart note (a clinical/lab report), here are the 8 structured analysis objects generated using the BloomCell framework:



Now proceeding to **Step 4** — building merged records — and then **Step 5** — storing each one in CosmosDB immediately.



Storing record 1 of 8 now:Record 1 saved ✅. Storing record 2 of 8:Record 2 saved ✅. Storing record 3 of 8:Record 3 saved ✅. Storing record 4 of 8:Record 4 saved ✅. Storing record 5 of 8:Record 5 saved ✅. Storing record 6 of 8:Record 6 saved ✅. Storing record 7 of 8:Record 7 saved ✅. Storing record 8 of 8:8 records saved successfully.

Now proceeding to **Step 6** — updating the original PatientDocument record.

Document updated successfully.
